_fixture_meta.source: Firestore emulator (agent VM lacks direct ken-e-dev Firestore access; emulator seeded with representative fixture)
_fixture_meta.note: Represents the legacy monitoring_topics/{account_id} doc payload translated to the MonitoringTopicsResponse API shape. Used by DM-26 to verify that GET /api/v1/accounts/{id}/monitoring_topics returns identical content before and after the data migration.
